sentences.english: I subscribe to too many streaming services.
Netflix, Disney Plus, YouTube Premium — it all adds up.
sentences.korean: 넷플릭스 디즈니플러스 유튜브 프리미엄 — 다 합치면 꽤 돼요.

sentences.english: I only have one, and I share the account with my family.
It saves a lot of money.
I cancelled all my subscriptions and just use free content now, like podcasts and YouTube.
sentences.korean: 모든 구독을 취소하고 이제 무료 콘텐츠만 써요. 팟캐스트랑 유튜브 같은 거요.
